ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "body_size" TEXT /* Body size (e.g., XS, S, M) */,
  "uk_size" TEXT /* UK size (e.g., 6, 8-10) */,
  "us_size" TEXT /* US size equivalent */,
  "eu_size" TEXT /* EU size equivalent */,
  "bust_cm" TEXT /* Bust measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist_cm" TEXT /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "hips_cm" TEXT /* Hips measurement in centimeters */,
  "shoulder_cm" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement in centimeters */,
  "sleeve_length_cm" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement in centimeters */,
  "inseam_cm" TEXT /* Inseam measurement in centimeters (for bottoms) */,
  "rise_cm" TEXT /* Rise measurement in centimeters (for bottoms) */,
  "product_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_product_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the category image */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) for the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "is_discontinued" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is discontinued */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the product was added to the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size combination */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in this size available in stock */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date when the stock was last updated */,
  "is_backordered" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product size is backordered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the store */,
  "store_type" TEXT /* Type of store (e.g., physical, online) */,
  "store_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date the store was opened */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the store is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_store_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_inventories" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product size combination */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product size available in the store */,
  "last_inventory_check" TEXT /* Date of the last inventory check */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_inventories_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_inventories_product_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("product_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sale occurred */,
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product size combination sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product size sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer (if known) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "is_returned" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sale was returned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("product_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., store manager, inventory manager, data analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store the user is associated with */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales report */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store the report is for */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sales period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sales period */,
  "total_sales" TEXT /* Total sales amount for the period */,
  "total_quantity" INTEGER /* Total quantity of items sold for the period */,
  "report_generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "average_sale_amount" TEXT /* Average sale amount for the period */,
  "best_selling_product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the best-selling product */,
  "worst_selling_product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the worst-selling product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_worst_selling_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("worst_selling_product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_best_selling_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("best_selling_product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
